script_text: Which two letters make the "shhh" sound?
Think of ship! Sh sh ship!
Which two letters make the "chh" sound like in chip?
Which word starts with the th sound?
Put your tongue behind your teeth and say thuh!
Look at the word ship. What two letters spell one sound?
The first two letters make the "shhh" sound together.
Which word has the ch sound at the end?
Listen to the very last sound in each word.
